title: Profile for forming an article of furniture
abstract: A profile for forming an article of furniture (1) comprising a base portion (2) provided with a free face (3) for association with a structural component (4) of the article of furniture is herein described. The profile (1) further comprises a finish and structure portion (5) associated with the base portion (2), wherein the finish and structure portion (5) comprises: at least one contact point (6) for association with the structural component (4) of the article of furniture, and the finish and structure portion (5) further comprises a finish end (7) defining at least one of a first finish (12) and a second finish (13) of the article of furniture.
claims:
Claims 1 . A profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ), the profile comprising a base portion (2) provided with a free face (3) for association with a structural component (4) of the article of furniture, the profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) being characterized by further comprising a finish and structure portion (5) associated with the base portion (2), wherein the finish and structure portion (5) comprises: at least one contact point (6) for association with the structural component (4) of the article of furniture, and the finish and structure portion (5) further comprises a finish end (7) defining at least one of a first finish (12) and a second finish (13) of the article of furniture. 2. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 1 , characterized by the fact that the contact point (6) is disposed in a first projection (18) of the finish and structure portion (5), the first projection (18) projecting from the finish and structure portion (5) towards the structural component (4) of the article of furniture. 3. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 2, characterized by the fact that the finish end (7) extends beyond the contact point (6), thus defining the first finish (12) by means of a gap (8) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7), alternatively, the finish end (7) is defined by the contact point (6), thus defining the second finish (13) by means of a step (9) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7). 4. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 3, characterized by the fact that in the second finish (13) the finish end (7) does not project beyond the contact point (6). 5. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according 

 to claim 3, characterized by the fact that the gap (8) is further defined by the first projection (18) of the finish and structure portion (5). 6. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 3, characterized by the fact that the gap (8) and the step (9) are visible by a user of the article of furniture (1 ). 7. A profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ), the profile comprising a base portion (2) provided with a free face (3) for association with a structural component (4) of the article of furniture, the profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) being characterized by further comprising a finish and structure portion (5) associated with the base portion (2), wherein the finish and structure portion (5) comprises: at least one contact point (6) for association with the structural component (4) of the article of furniture, and the finish and structure portion (5) further comprises a finish end (7) which extends beyond the contact point (6), thus defining a first finish (12) of the article of furniture by means of a gap (8) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7). 8. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 7, characterized by the fact that the gap (8) is further defined by a first projection (18) of the finish and structure portion (5), the first projection (5) projecting from the finish and structure portion (5) towards the structural component (4) of the article of furniture. 9. A profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ), the profile comprising a base portion (2) provided with a free face (3) for association with a structural component (4) of the article of furniture, the profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) being characterized by further comprising a finish and structure portion (5) associated with the base portion (2), wherein the finish and structure portion (5) comprises: 

 at least one contact point (6) for association with the structural component (4) of the article of furniture, and the finish and structure portion (5) further comprises a finish end (7) which is defined by the contact point (6), thus defining a second finish (13) of the article of furniture by means of a step (9) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7). 10. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 9, characterized by the fact that the finish end (7) does not project beyond the contact point (6). 1 1 . A profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ), the profile comprising a base portion (2) provided with a free face (3) for association with a structural component (4) of the article of furniture, the profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) being characterized by further comprising a finish and structure portion (5) associated with the base portion (2), wherein the finish and structure portion (5) comprises: at least one contact point (6) for association with the structural component (4) of the article of furniture, and the finish and structure portion (5) further comprises a finish end (7) defining at least one of a first finish (12) and a second finish (13) of the article of furniture, wherein: the finish end (7) extends beyond the contact point (6), thus defining the first finish (12) by means of a gap (8) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7), alternatively, the finish end (7) is defined by the contact point (6), thus defining the second finish (13) by means of a step (9) between the structural component (4) and the finish end (7). 12. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) 

 according to claim 1 1 , characterized by the fact that in the second finish (13) the finish end (7) does not project beyond the contact point (6). 13. The profile for forming an article of furniture (1 ) according to claim 12, characterized by the fact that the gap (8) and the step (9) are visible by a user of the article of furniture (1 ).
